title: HSE Intern
description:
Do you want to shape beneficial technologies with your ideas?
If so, join us as
HSE Intern
Job Description
Assists in HSE trainings organization for all employees
Supports preparation, updates of training material and record keeping
Supports executing of health checkups and tracking of related records
Working instructions creation
Updates legal evidences in HSE fields
Other supporting tasks in HSE team
Qualifications
Recent graduate or last year student of faculty in the field of Occupational Health & Safety, Environmental Protection, Fire protection & emergency response etc.
Completed or redistricted for professional exam in the field of health & safety and/or fire protection
Fluency in English
Good Excel skills
Excellent communication skills and teamwork
Benefits
Paid six-month internship
An active role in projects and real business situations
Work with experienced mentors who will support you
International work environment where innovation and creativity are valued
Transportation and canteen at the location
Various possibilities for sports activities
Do you want beneficial technologies being shaped by your ideas? Whether in the areas of mobility solutions, consumer goods, industrial technology or energy and building technology – with us, you will have the chance to improve quality of life all across the globe. Welcome to Bosch.
At our plant in Pecinci, we are manufacture and develop wiper systems and wiper blades.
We are looking forward to your application!
If you are ready to start #LikeABosch , please fill in the contact form and submit your CV ( PDF format) in English language.
If you have any questions, you can contact us.

title: Advokatski pripravnik
description:
Renomiranoj advokatskoj kancelariji Damnjanović potreban je advokatski pripravnik/-ica, radi sticanja praktičnog znanja i iskustva u radu iz oblasti privrednog prava i građanskih obligacija.
Advokatska kancelarija ima dugogodišnje iskustvo u radu sa pripravnicima, poseban program progresivnog osposobljavanja pripravnika, uz neposrednu posvećenost principala i radu u prijatnom okruženju.
Kandidat će uz mentorsku podršku iskusnih advokata biti osposobljen za samostalno zastupanje klijenata pred sudom i drugim državnim organima i pružanje ostalih pravnih usluga iz svih pravnih oblasti, izuzev krivičnog prava.
Uslovi za konkurisanje:
završen pravni fakultet
znanje engleskog jezika
poznavanje rada na računaru (elementarno u WORD i EXEL programima)
komunikacione veštine i sposobnost rada u timu
Šta nudimo:
priliku za rad u renomiranoj advokatskoj kancelariji sa dugogodišnjim iskustvom
mogućnost profesionalnog razvoja kroz praktičnu obuku i zastupanje pred sudom i osposobljavanja za samostalan rad
mentorsku podršku i obuku od strane iskusnih advokata
adekvatnu naknadu za rad sa mogućnošću povećanja u skladu sa napredovanjem u radu
prijatan i podsticajan radni ambijent
Ako ste zainteresovani za rad u našoj kancelariji, pozivamo vas da se prijavite za ovu poziciju. Radujemo se mogućnosti da vas upoznamo i razmotrimo vašu prijavu.
Rad se obavlja u kancelariji na adresi: Novi Beograd, Bulevar Zorana Đinđića 58
Kandidati mogu poslati CV elektronskim putem.
Kandidati koji udju u uži izbor biće kontaktirani.
required_skills: komunikacione veštine i sposobnost rada u timu

title: Project Management Intern
description:
Project Management Intern
Location: Novi Sad R&D
OUR COMPANY
Since its spin-off in September 2025 AUMOVIO continues the business of the former Continental group sector Automotive as an independent company. The technology and electronics company offers a wide-ranging portfolio that makes mobility safe, exciting, connected, and autonomous. This includes sensor solutions, displays, braking and comfort systems as well as comprehensive expertise in software, architecture platforms, and assistance systems for software-defined vehicles. In the fiscal year 2024 the business areas, which now belong to AUMOVIO, generated sales of 19.6 billion Euro. The company is headquartered in Frankfurt, Germany and has about 87.000 employees in more than 100 locations worldwide.
JOB DESCRIPTION
We're looking for a detail-oriented and organized Project Management Intern to join our team. In this role, you will support our project management team by assisting with the coordination, planning, and execution of various projects. This internship offers an excellent opportunity to gain hands-on experience in project management while developing your professional skill set in a collaborative corporate environment.
IN YOUR DAILY WORK, YOU WILL
Support in PM organization for implementation and monitoring of development procedures and methods
Set up and drive implementation of small-size projects and ECRs (engineering change requests) as defined by the specification documentation
Assist in the planning and implementation of projects
Assign work packages to development project team members and ensure proper execution with the support of the Project Manager / Senior Project Manager
Help coordinate and manage project tasks, risks, and deliverables
Analyze data as required, with the support of the Project Manager / Senior Project Manager
Track and report project progress
Perform other duties assigned by the Project Manager in an orderly and efficient manner
QUALIFICATIONS
Final year student or recent graduate with a bachelor's degree in Technical Sciences, Organizational Sciences, or a related field.
Fluent in English, advanced user of MS Office suite
Ability to understand project documentation
Good problem-solving skills
Initiative-driven with strong organizational and multitasking skills.
Customer oriented
WOULD BE A PLUS
Acting as a Project Manager Assistant (or in a similar role) in multidisciplinary teams in a tech field
Collaborating with remote teams
Basic understanding of production processes in the automotive industry
Basic understanding of automotive standards and methodologies
Experience using JIRA or a similar ticketing system
German language communication abilities
Usage of AI tools in the project management area
WHAT WE OFFER
Paid internship
Flexible schedule
Mentorship program
Travel allowance
Comprehensive training on the job
Ready to take your career to the next level? The future of mobility isn’t just anyone’s job. Make it yours! Join AUMOVIO. Own What’s Next.
If you are interested in this job position, you can send us your resume and letter of application in English language via Infostud.
Only short-listed candidates will be contacted.

title: Mobility Aftermarket Sales Department Intern
description:
Do you want to shape beneficial technologies with your ideas?
If so, join us as
Mobility Aftermarket Sales Department Intern
Job Description
Providing technical support to sales/marketing personnel
First-level evaluation of customer warranty claims (technical and commercial)
Handling of old-core products belonging to Bosch eXchange program
Translation of marketing materials and product manuals
Administration of processes connected with technical trainings
Ad-hoc on-site support for repairs, installations, and warranty checks
Providing support for different sales team activities
Qualifications
Recent graduate or last year student of Technical Faculty or similar
Strong organizational and communication skills and follow-up ability
Advanced knowledge of MS Office, with focus on MS Excel
Excellent knowledge of English language, both written and spoken
Category B driving license with clean record
Benefits
Paid six-month internship
An active role in projects and real business situations
Work with experienced mentors who will support you
International work environment where innovation and creativity are valued
Canteen at the location
and organized transport
(to Pećinci plant)
Various possibilities for sports activities
Do you want to shape beneficial technologies with your ideas? Whether in mobility solutions, consumer goods, industrial technology, or energy and building technology – with us, you will have the chance to improve quality of life all across the globe.
As part of the Mobility Aftermarket division, you will work on product marketing, quality management, trade marketing, purchasing, and engineering to drive business excellence while collaborating closely with international teams.
If you are ready to start #LikeABosch , please fill in the contact form and submit your CV ( PDF format) in English language.
If you have any questions, you can contact us.

title: Payroll Intern
Employer Branding Intern
description:
Employer Branding Intern
Location: Novi Sad R&D & Plant
OUR COMPANY
Since its spin-off in September 2025 AUMOVIO continues the business of the former Continental group sector Automotive as an independent company. The technology and electronics company offers a wide-ranging portfolio that makes mobility safe, exciting, connected, and autonomous. This includes sensor solutions, displays, braking and comfort systems as well as comprehensive expertise in software, architecture platforms, and assistance systems for software-defined vehicles. In the fiscal year 2024 the business areas, which now belong to AUMOVIO, generated sales of 19.6 billion Euro. The company is headquartered in Frankfurt, Germany and has about 87.000 employees in more than 100 locations worldwide.
JOB DESCRIPTION
Participate in creation of monthly plan for employer branding activities, that includes calendar for social media postings, blog content, offline and online events that promotes Continental as attractive employer
Designing visuals for social media posts, campaign posters
Support the development and execution of employer branding campaigns across social media and other relevant channels
Monitor various social media platforms such as Facebook, LinkedIn, Instagram and tracks social media engagement to identify high-performing ideas and campaign for scalability
Create content for Internet site and all relevant portals where Continental is present
Help organize events such as meet-ups, visits, and both online and offline activities
Assist in planning, writing and managing monthly e-newsletter
Cooperation with faculties and high schools
QUALIFICATIONS
Currently enrolled in university or a recent graduate with a bachelor’s degree in Faculty of Technical Science, Marketing, Communications, Psychology, or a related field
Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal
Advanced knowledge of the English language
Familiar with Microsoft Office tools, Meta Business Suite, Figma, Photoshop, Canva and Video editing
Interested in social media trends
WHAT WE OFFER
Paid internship
Flexible schedule
Mentorship program
Travel allowance
Comprehensive training on the job
Ready to take your career to the next level? The future of mobility isn’t just anyone’s job. Make it yours! Join AUMOVIO. Own What’s Next.
If you are interested in this job position, you can send us your resume and letter of application in English language via Infostud.
Only short-listed candidates will be contacted.
required_skills: Advanced knowledge of the English language

title: Logistics Material Flow Intern
description:
Do you want to shape beneficial technologies with your ideas?

Logistics Material Flow Intern
Job Description
Assisting in the design and implementation of logistic processes in the warehouse and manufacturing
Supporting the analysis and improvement of existing logistic processes with a focus on safety, quality, delivery, costs, and customer satisfaction
Monitoring key logistics performance indicators and identifying areas for improvement
Assisting in the coordination of short-term process changes and non-standard activities
Participating in the documentation of logistics processes, including work instructions and training materials
Supporting the procurement planning of necessary equipment for process implementation
Assisting in the implementation of corrective actions in case of deviations from standard processes
Collaborating with different teams within the department to support logistics operations
Providing support in resolving urgent production-related issues
Qualifications
Recent graduate or last year student of Faculty of Technical Sciences, Faculty of Organizational Sciences, Faculty of Transport and Traffic Engineering etc
Advanced Excel skills
Fundamental knowledge of SAP (WM, MM) will be considered an advantage
Proactive and structured work
Good organizational and analytical skills
Excellent communication skills and teamwork
Fluency in English

Paid six-month internship
An active role in projects and real business situations
Work with experienced mentors who will support you
International work environment where innovation and creativity are valued
Canteen at the location and organized transport (to Pećinci plant)
